name: Bastrop Pickleball Association
description: Bastrop Pickleball Association is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Bastrop, TX. There are 10 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.
fees: Members only — Tourists welcome to use free of charge.

name: Elgin Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Elgin Recreation Center in Elgin, TX! There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.
open_play_schedule: Open play dates: Monday, Wednesday, and Friday

name: Lost Pines Pickleball Club
description: Lost Pines Pickleball Club is a place to play pickleball in Bastrop, TX. There are 13 concrete courts. 4 are outdoors and 9 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, and trainers or lessons.

name: Smithville Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Smithville Recreation Center in Smithville, TX! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Star Ranch Nudist Resort
description:
The  world-class pickleball courts at Star Ranch are new in 2024, so come out and check it out. The upgraded courts meet all specifications of USAPickleball. 
After pickleball, enjoy a swim in one of the two pools on the ranch or relax in the hot tub!
open_play_schedule: Pickup games and tournaments are regularly scheduled, check Activities on starranch.net.
fees: Fee required — All amenities, including access to the pickleball courts, are available on a day pass or club membership. The courts are otherwise free to use.
